## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Design update
- [ ] Content update
- [ ] Documentation update

- List key changes
- Use bullet points
- Be specific

## Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number)

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots of your changes (especially for UI changes).

### Before
[Screenshot or description of current state]

[Screenshot or description of new state]

## Testing Checklist
- [ ] Tested in development mode (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] Tested production build (`npm run build && npm run preview`)
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport
- [ ] Tested on tablet viewport
- [ ] Tested on desktop viewport
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Lighthouse checks pass (Performance, Accessibility, SEO)

## Design System Compliance
- [ ] Uses design tokens from `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] Follows Figma specifications (if applicable)
- [ ] Typography follows brand guidelines
- [ ] Colors match brand palette (#44C0C0 primary)

## Accessibility
- [ ] Semantic HTML used
- [ ] ARIA labels added where needed
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG AA

## Additional Notes
Any extra context or considerations for reviewers.
